title: Handshake
brief: Acquire secondary control of the HSA capability and hold it. FA isn't ready at boot — wait for it to advertise AVAILABLE before you ACQUIRE.
teaches: The control-acquisition handshake: FA advertises the capability TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE at boot and signals AVAILABLE only once it is ready (VI Vol §1.2.2.4) — ACQUIRE before then is REJECTED. Wait for AVAILABLE, then ACQUIRE. FA also silently ignores flight commands until you are the secondary controller (VI Vol §1.2.2.2).

objective._doc: No flight. Win = MA is the secondary controller of MULE-01 for 30 consecutive ticks (hold-control). FA advertises MULE-01 AVAILABLE only at tick 12 (capability-available event); ACQUIRE before then is REJECTED, an early flight command is ignored.
